data.title: Typography: drop uppercase from .text-title/.text-subtitle, sweep ad-hoc Fraunces to canonical utilities

data.body:
**Context:** User reviewed the deployed site (fractal-nyc.netlify.app/campus) and flagged that "FRACTAL CAMPUS SERVES FOUR AUDIENCES" rendering italic + all-caps does not match their intended typographic voice. Confirmed during dialogue: - The all-caps comes from `.text-title` (per DESIGN.md spec, src/index.css:167–172) - The "small italic Fraunces" subtitle on the same page is an ad-hoc leftover not yet migrated to `.text-subtitle` - User wants **no Fraunces italic + uppercase combinations anywhere on the site** **Decision:** DESIGN.md is source of truth — so DESIGN.md changes first, then code follows. ## Scope **1. Update DESIGN.md typography table (Semantic type scale section, around line 215–216):** | Utility | Current | New | |---|---|---| | `.text-display` | upright, weight 300, uppercase, tracking 0.04em, leading 1.1 | unchanged | | `.text-title` | italic, **uppercase**, tracking 0.04em | italic, tracking 0.04em (**drop uppercase**) | | `.text-subtitle` | italic, weight 300, **uppercase**, tracking 0.04em | italic, weight 300, tracking 0.04em (**drop uppercase**) | Also audit prose elsewhere in DESIGN.md for any references to "uppercase title/subtitle" or "italic + uppercase" that need to be revised (Do's & Don'ts section likely needs review). **2. Update `src/index.css`:** - `.text-title` (lines 167–172): remove `text-transform: uppercase;` - `.text-subtitle` (lines 174–180): remove `text-transform: uppercase;` - `.text-display` (lines 158–164): unchanged **3. Sweep ad-hoc Fraunces leftovers to canonical utilities.** Each of the following must be reviewed and either migrated to the right tier OR explicitly justified for staying ad-hoc: - `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:200` — `

` (Campus hero sub-headline) - `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:230` — `

` ("A campus in the heart of Williamsburg.") — **the primary motivating example** - `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:500` — `

` - `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:529` — `

` - `src/components/sections/Events.tsx:10` — `

` - `src/components/sections/NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx:109` — `

` - `src/components/sections/Projects.tsx:31` — `

` - `src/components/sections/Vision.tsx:29` — `

` - `src/pages/LabPage.tsx:53` — `

` (Note: `HouseBannerGrid.tsx:22` uses `.display-roman` and is intentional; `AvatarBadge.tsx:148` is a monogram and is intentional. Skip both.) **4. Cleanup: remove now-redundant `normal-case` from existing `.text-title` and `.text-subtitle` call sites.** Once the utilities no longer apply uppercase, the `normal-case` override is dead weight. Grep `text-title.*normal-case` and `text-subtitle.*normal-case` and strip. ## Acceptance criteria - DESIGN.md updated; `npx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md` passes - `.text-title` and `.text-subtitle` in `src/index.css` no longer apply `text-transform: uppercase` - No `font-serif` paragraph or heading on master uses a custom size class when `.text-display`/`.text-title`/`.text-subtitle` would fit — exceptions documented in the plan - Redundant `normal-case` on `.text-title`/`.text-subtitle` sites removed - Visual check on Campus page: "Fractal Campus serves four audiences" renders italic + mixed case (not uppercase); the Williamsburg intro line renders consistently with other subtitles sitewide - `pnpm type-check`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test` pass ## Mobile-first Verify at 375px viewport on every changed surface. None of these changes should affect mobile layout (text-transform only) but the visual sweep must happen on phone width first. ## Out of scope - Body / chrome tier changes (`.text-body`, `.text-eyebrow`, etc.) - Button typography - Adding new typography utilities - Fixing other unrelated DESIGN.md drift

**SPEC LOCKED (supersedes initial draft).** After user dialogue, final typography hierarchy:

| Utility | Final spec | Change from current master |
|---|---|---|
| `.text-display` | upright, weight 300, **uppercase**, tracking 0.04em, leading 1.1, `text-5xl md:text-7xl` | **no change** |
| `.text-title` | italic, **mixed case**, tracking 0.04em, default weight (400), `text-3xl md:text-5xl` | **drop `text-transform: uppercase`** |
| `.text-subtitle` | **upright (font-style: normal)**, weight 300 (thin), **mixed case**, tracking 0.04em, `text-xl md:text-2xl` | **drop uppercase AND drop italic** — now upright instead of italic |

**Design rationale (record for posterity):** each tier now has its own identity — display is the only uppercase tier (reserved for hero impact), title is the only italic tier (section-header flair), subtitle is calm upright supporting voice. No tier combines italic + uppercase.

## File changes

**`DESIGN.md`** — Semantic type scale table (around line 215):
- `.text-title` row: drop "uppercase" from the rendering column
- `.text-subtitle` row: drop "italic" and "uppercase" from the rendering column → "upright, weight 300, tracking 0.04em"
- Audit surrounding prose (Do's & Don'ts, anywhere that says "italic + uppercase headings") for refs that need revising

**`src/index.css`**:
- `.text-title` (lines 167–172): remove `text-transform: uppercase;`
- `.text-subtitle` (lines 174–180): remove `text-transform: uppercase;` AND change `font-style: italic;` → `font-style: normal;`
- `.text-display` (lines 158–164): no change

**Component sweep** (ad-hoc Fraunces leftovers → canonical utilities, with the new spec):
- `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:200` — `text-lg md:text-xl font-serif` (Campus hero sub-headline) → likely needs new body-serif tier OR justify staying ad-hoc; **flag in plan**
- `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:230` — `text-2xl md:text-3xl font-serif` ("A campus in the heart of Williamsburg.") → migrate to `.text-subtitle` (will become upright, mixed case — note: loses italic from the current rendering)
- `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:500` — `text-lg md:text-xl font-serif italic` → body-serif tier OR justify; flag
- `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:529` — `text-lg md:text-xl font-serif` → body-serif tier OR justify; flag
- `src/components/sections/Events.tsx:10` — `text-3xl md:text-5xl font-serif` → migrate to `.text-title`
- `src/components/sections/NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx:109` — `text-lg md:text-xl font-serif` → body-serif tier OR justify; flag
- `src/components/sections/Projects.tsx:31` — `text-3xl md:text-5xl font-serif` → migrate to `.text-title`
- `src/components/sections/Vision.tsx:29` — `text-lg md:text-2xl font-serif italic` → tweener size, flag for plan
- `src/pages/LabPage.tsx:53` — `text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif` → close to `.text-title` (3xl/5xl); migrate, accept slight size shift, OR flag

**Cleanup:**
- Strip now-redundant `normal-case` from existing `.text-title` / `.text-subtitle` call sites (was overriding uppercase that's no longer applied)

**Out of scope (deferred to follow-up tasks if needed):**
- Adding a `.text-body-serif` tier for body-sized Fraunces (multiple sweep sites would benefit but it's a real semantic addition, not a fix)
- Killing the global `.font-serif { italic; uppercase }` rule in `src/index.css:96` (separate escape-hatch problem)
- Wordmark "Collective" weight-100 carve-out documentation in DESIGN.md Components section
- Body/chrome tiers, buttons

If the planning sub-agent finds that several sweep sites really need `.text-body-serif`, it should **flag this in the plan** and ask the orchestrator whether to expand scope or punt to a follow-up FRAC task. Do not silently invent a new tier mid-implementation.

## Acceptance criteria

- DESIGN.md updated; `npx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md` passes
- `.text-title` no longer applies uppercase
- `.text-subtitle` no longer applies uppercase and is upright (not italic)
- All sweep sites either migrated to a canonical utility OR have an explicit one-line justification in the implementation commit / plan for why they stay ad-hoc
- Redundant `normal-case` removed from existing `.text-title`/`.text-subtitle` call sites
- Visual check at 375px: Campus "Fractal Campus serves four audiences" renders italic + mixed case; "A campus in the heart of Williamsburg." renders upright + mixed case (no italic), consistent with sitewide subtitle voice
- `pnpm type-check`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test` pass

**SCOPE NARROWED 2026-06-08.** This task is now strictly the spec change. Component sweep, ad-hoc Fraunces migrations, `normal-case` cleanup, and per-page visual checks are **all moved to FRAC-18** (sitewide per-page audit).

## In scope (final)

**`DESIGN.md`** — Semantic type scale table (around line 215):
- `.text-title` row: drop "uppercase" from the rendering column
- `.text-subtitle` row: drop "italic" and "uppercase" → "upright, weight 300, tracking 0.04em"
- Audit surrounding prose (Do's & Don'ts, anywhere referencing "italic + uppercase headings") for refs that need revising
- `npx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md` passes

**`src/index.css`**:
- `.text-title` (lines 167–172): remove `text-transform: uppercase;`
- `.text-subtitle` (lines 174–180): remove `text-transform: uppercase;` AND change `font-style: italic;` → `font-style: normal;`
- `.text-display` (lines 158–164): no change

**Quality gates:**
- `pnpm type-check`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test` pass
- DESIGN.md lint clean

## Out of scope (moved to FRAC-18)

- Sweeping ad-hoc Fraunces leftovers in `src/components/sections/*.tsx` etc.
- Stripping redundant `normal-case` from existing `.text-title`/`.text-subtitle` call sites
- Per-page visual checks at 375px
- Anything else per-page

## Why

User feedback: FRAC-17 should be the small, fast, mergeable spec change so the canonical type scale is settled. The per-page remediation belongs in the sitewide audit umbrella (FRAC-18), which depends on this task landing first.
